column3: "Lemon boosts immunity" refers to its ability to support your body's natural defenses against illnesses due to its high vitamin C content and other beneficial nutrients.
"Lemon promotes digestion" refers to its ability to aid in breaking down food, making it easier to be digested by the body.
"Lemon fights cancer" refers to its antioxidant property that helps protect cells from damage caused by free radicals, potentially reducing the risk of cancer development.

"Lemon reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to lessen swelling, pain, and tenderness that results from injuries or 
         diseases.
"Lemon improves skin health" refers to its benefits, which may enhance our complexion by providing vitamin C that aids collagen production and brightens skin tone.
"Lemon aids in weight loss" refers to its contribution in supporting healthy body functions that help people manage their weight.
"Lemon supports heart health" refers to its antioxidants aiding the circulatory system's overall functioning.
"Lemon regulates blood sugar levels" refers to its ability to keep healthy control on our body's glucose level through some key properties it contains.
"Lemon reduces stress and anxiety" refers to its ability to help people feel calmer and more relaxed due to its aroma or other natural components.
"Lemon promotes brain function" refers to its ability to improve mental activity, memory retention, and concentration by offering nutrients and antioxidants.
